title: Sole completely separating after 3 months of light office use
body: I bought a pair of the Madrid Eco-Knit in February. I wear them 1-2 times a week to work in an office setting. Today, the sole is completely separating from the shoe. I'm incredibly disappointed in the quality of these shoes. For the price, I would have expected them to last much longer than 3 months of very light use.

title: Sizing very off, still too tight ordering up
body: I was excited to try these shoes, however the sizing is very off. I normally wear an 8.5 but ordered a 9 to be safe. It was still so tight and uncomfortable that it hurt my feet. I will be returning them.

title: Hands-free mechanism broke within a month, only offered 40% off
body: I purchased a pair of Kizik shoes on February 15, 2024 for my husband. Within a month of wearing them, the hands-free part of the heel broke on the right shoe. I feel the product is defective and should be replaced. I am not satisfied with the 40% off response to purchase another pair when these shoes are clearly defective. They are ripping at the seam where the hard plastic piece is to make them 'hands-free.'

title: Incredibly uncomfortable
body: These are incredibly uncomfortable shoes. I really wanted to like them, but they just hurt my feet so bad. Don't believe the hype.

title: Chemical smell, returned for refund but got gift card instead
body: Terrible shoes & terrible return policy. The shoes feel cheap and have an awful chemical smell. I sent them back for a refund and instead of getting my money back, they sent me a gift card for the purchase price. Who does that? Now I have a gift card for a product I don't want. BUYER BEWARE!!!!!

title: Sole separating from canvas after 4 months, 20 wears
body: I've had them for about 4 months and the sole is separating from the canvas. I've probably only worn them about 20 times total too, since they're just my 'slip on really quick to run to the store' shoes. Pretty disappointing for a $100+ shoe.

title: Heel collapsed making them hard to slip on, little support
body: So disappointed. I've been wearing them for a month and the heel has collapsed making them difficult to slip on. They have very little support and my feet hurt by the end of the day.
personas: The Plantar Fasciitis & Heel Pain Sufferer

title: Soles worn out, holes in heel, fabric tearing after 3 months
body: I purchased these shoes for my husband in May 2023. By August 2023, the soles wore out, there were holes in the heel, and the fabric on top was tearing. These are supposed to be high-quality, durable shoes that are comfortable for all-day wear. The comfort was there, but the durability was not. For a product that costs well over $100, I expect it to last longer than 3 months.
